title: zosterophyllanthos muriculatus
intro: Zosterophyllanthos muriculatus, also known as the rough-leaved zosterophyllanthos, is a species of flowering plant in the family Celastraceae. This plant is native to Australia and has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs. The leaves of the Zosterophyllanthos muriculatus contain compounds with anti-inflammatory and expectorant properties, which can help to relieve congestion and soothe irritated tissues. Herbal preparations of the plant, such as teas and tinctures, can be made to harness its health benefits, making it a popular natural remedy for respiratory conditions.
